tour.overviewBody: Overview is where you land. Once you go live, your revenue, bookings, occupancy and ratings show up here at a glance.
tour.bookingsBody: Every reservation lands here. Confirm or decline pending stays, see who's checking in, and open any booking for full details.
tour.inboxBody: Guest messages and enquiries live in the Inbox. Quick replies win more bookings — unread counts show right on this menu item.
tour.calendarBody: The Calendar shows every stay across your properties. Block dates, spot gaps, and keep your direct bookings in sync.
tour.listingsBody: Add and edit properties here — photos, pricing, rooms and amenities. Polished properties convert browsers into bookings.
tour.financesBody: The Finances group holds your ledger, payments, quotes, invoices, credit notes and refunds — a full picture of what you're owed and paid.
tour.settingsBody: Settings is home to your banking details, business profile and subscription plan. Get these right so payouts reach you.
tour.bookingLinkBody: This opens your direct booking page. Share it on social, WhatsApp or your website — guests book you directly, commission-free.

pitch.s1Sub: {brand} is the direct-booking platform built for South African hosts. No commission — just your guests, your money, your brand.
pitch.s2Point1Body: The big platforms take a cut off the top of every guest who finds you — forever.
pitch.s2Point2Body: Bookings in email, payments in a spreadsheet, chats on WhatsApp. Nothing joins up.
pitch.s2Point3Body: The platform owns the relationship. Stop paying and your guests vanish with it.
pitch.s3Title: One page. One dashboard. Zero commission.
pitch.s3Body: A branded booking page guests book directly, and one dashboard that runs the whole business. A flat monthly fee — never a slice of your bookings.
pitch.s4Title: The money goes straight to you.
pitch.s4Body: Guests pay into your own Paystack, PayPal or bank account. {brand} never holds, pools or touches your funds.
pitch.s5Body: Every guest who books is yours to keep — full contact details, conversation history and private notes. Reviews and reputation travel with the guest, so trust compounds.
pitch.s6Title: Every host headache — solved in one place.
pitch.featPaymentsBenefit: No commission. Guests pay by card, PayPal or EFT straight into your own account.
pitch.featInboxBenefit: Every conversation in one thread — the relationship the platforms used to take from you.
pitch.featBookingsBenefit: No more email, spreadsheets and WhatsApp. Confirm, decline and track every stay in one view.
pitch.featCalendarBenefit: Two-way iCal sync with Airbnb & Booking.com keeps every calendar in step.
pitch.featListingsBenefit: A branded booking page that's yours to share — not a listing buried in a marketplace.
pitch.featReviewsBenefit: Reviews are collected automatically and you reply in public — trust that follows you, not the platform.
pitch.featPricingBenefit: Seasonal rates and length-of-stay discounts apply themselves — no manual price changes.
pitch.featReportsBenefit: Revenue, occupancy and booking trends at a glance — decisions without the guesswork.
pitch.s8Title: Built, live, and ready for you.
pitch.s8Point1Body: Guests pay hosts directly through Paystack today.
pitch.s8Point2Body: ZAR pricing, local payment methods and local support — not a global app bolted on.
pitch.s8Point3Body: Built end-to-end and improving constantly. Your feedback shapes what's next.
pitch.s9Body: Create your free profile in minutes and get discovered today.
pitch.mAssumption: Example — a host taking {volume} a month in bookings:
pitch.mSavingsSub: That's about {yearly} a year back in your pocket.
pitch.mFootnote: Illustrative example — your saving grows with every booking.
pitch.dBody: Revenue, bookings, occupancy and ratings — your whole business at a glance, updated live.
pitch.bBody: Accept or decline in a tap, track deposits and balances, and see exactly who's arriving when.
pitch.cBody: One calendar for every channel. Two-way iCal sync keeps Airbnb and Booking.com in step automatically.
pitch.gBody: Your own branded page on the {brand} directory — share the link anywhere and take bookings direct, with no algorithm in the way.
pitch.rBody: Collected automatically after every stay and shown on your page — a reputation that follows you, not a marketplace.
pitch.hStep1Body: Claim your page and add your details in minutes.
pitch.hStep2Body: Photos, pricing, calendar and house rules — all guided.
pitch.hStep3Body: Share your link, take direct bookings, and the money lands in your account.
pitch.s7Sub: One flat fee. No commission, no per-booking cut, no surprises.
pitch.oTitle: Yes — it's safe, and it's yours.
pitch.oA1: Guests pay into your own Paystack, PayPal or bank account. {brand} never holds your funds.
pitch.oQ2: Who owns my guests and data?
pitch.oA2: You do — full contact details, history and notes, yours to keep and export.
pitch.oA3: No contracts. A flat monthly fee you can cancel anytime.
pitch.oQ4: Do I lose my existing listings?
pitch.oA4: No — sync your calendar with Airbnb and Booking.com and run them side by side.

nav.tagline: Direct bookings · zero commission to guests

footer.tagline: South Africa's direct-stay platform. Book directly with the host. Pay the price you see.

home.heroSubtitle: {count, plural, =0 {Book straight with the host — secure payment, zero booking fees, no middle-man.} =1 {Browse {formatted} verified property and book straight with the host — secure payment, zero booking fees, no middle-man.} other {Browse {formatted} verified properties and book straight with the host — secure payment, zero booking fees, no middle-man.}}
home.dealsTitle: December at the coast — save up to 25%
home.dealsBody: Selected Garden Route and Whale Coast stays, booked direct with the host. No code needed.
home.groupBody: Hand-picked stays that sleep 8+. Game lodges, beach houses, working farms — book the whole thing, no per-head haggling.
home.pillarsTitle: Direct stays, the way they should be.
home.pillarNoFeesBody: The price you see is the price you pay. No service fees, no surprise charges at checkout.
home.pillarVerifiedBody: Every host is ID-verified and payment-vetted before they can list. Look for the green tick.
home.pillarTalkBody: Message the actual host before you book. Real answers, no scripted call-centre replies.
home.pillarCancelBody: Policies shown up-front with a one-tap refund preview. No hunting through fine print.
home.hostTitle: Got a place to share? List it on {brand}.
home.hostBody: Branded booking page, calendar that syncs with Airbnb & Booking.com, unified inbox, payments via Paystack or PayPal. Flat monthly fee. Zero commissions.
home.newsTitle: New stays in your inbox every Friday.
home.newsBody: Six hand-picked stays a week. Honest reviews from real guests. Zero spam, one-click unsubscribe — and no, we won't sell your email to anyone.
home.appTitle: Book on the way to the airport.
home.appBody: Native iOS and Android apps. Save listings, message hosts, manage your bookings — all in your pocket.
home.featuredBody: The places we'd send our own friends. Real photos, fair pricing, and a host you can actually message.

listing.notChargedYet: You won't be charged yet · choose your dates & rooms next.
listing.heldSecurely: Held securely until your trip is confirmed.
listing.availabilityBody: Dates the host has blocked or that are already booked.
listing.hlInstantBody: Confirm your stay immediately — no waiting on the host.
listing.hlCheckinBodyTime: Check-in from {time} — the host shares full directions ahead of arrival.
listing.hlCheckinBody: The host shares full directions ahead of arrival.
listing.hlVerifiedBody: Identity and payment details verified by {brand}.
listing.roomsSubtitle: Book one room, a few, or the whole place — you'll choose when you reserve.
listing.roomsTapReserve: Tap Reserve to pick your dates and rooms.
listing.safetyNote: For your safety, never transfer money or chat outside {brand}.
listing.ratesIntroRooms: Prices below are per room, per night, in {currency}. The host sets seasonal tiers across the year.
listing.ratesIntro: Prices below are per night, in {currency}. The host sets seasonal tiers across the year.
listing.ratesPickDates: Pick your dates in the calendar to see the exact nightly price for your stay.
listing.ratesStandardDesc: Applies on any date outside the seasons below.
listing.ratesCleaningNote: Cleaning fee (<fee></fee>) and any add-ons are separate
listing.ratesExtrasSuffix: , charged per night on top of the rate.
listing.ratesWeeklyBody: {pct}% off when you stay 7+ nights, applied automatically at checkout.
listing.trustRepliesDays: {count, plural, one {Replies in ~# day} other {Replies in ~# days}}
listing.trustYearsHosting: {count, plural, one {# yr hosting} other {# yrs hosting}}
listing.hostRatingFrom: {rating} from {count, plural, one {# verified stay} other {# verified stays}}

thingsToKnow.maxGuests: {count, plural, one {# guest maximum} other {# guests maximum}}
thingsToKnow.minNights: {count, plural, one {# night minimum} other {# nights minimum}}
thingsToKnow.nonRefundable: Non-refundable — no refund at any time.
thingsToKnow.ruleDaysBefore: {count, plural, one {#+ day before check-in} other {#+ days before check-in}}
thingsToKnow.contactHost: Contact the host for cancellation terms.
thingsToKnow.legal: By booking you agree to the <terms>booking terms</terms> and <privacy>privacy notice</privacy>.

currency.estimateNote: Prices shown in {display} are estimates — you'll be charged in {settlement}.

booking.failedBody: No worries — your card wasn't charged. You can try again with a different card, or contact the host directly.

book.step1Sub: Pick when you're coming and the rooms you'd like — book one, a few, or the whole place.
book.step2Sub: Tell your host who's coming and add anything to make the stay special.
book.step3Sub: All payments are processed securely. {brand} never charges a booking fee.

businesses.title: Businesses
businesses.subtitle: Each business has its own details, address, banking, currency and language. Properties are assigned to a business, and its details appear on that property's quotes and invoices.
businesses.currencyHint: Default for new properties assigned to this business.
businesses.languageHint: Default language for this business's guest documents.
businesses.archiveConfirmBody: It will be hidden from your list. You can't archive the default business or one that still has properties assigned.
businesses.bankingSubtitle: The default account prints on this business's invoices, quotes and EFT instructions.
businesses.personalSubtitle: For your records only — never shown to guests or printed on documents.

website.heading: Your website
website.subheading: A branded, hosted site for your business — built from your property data, funnelling bookings into your existing engine.
website.noBusinesses: Add a business first to create its website.
website.createBody: Pick a web address. You can connect a custom domain later.
website.publishDisabledHint: Finish building your pages, then publish to go live.
website.errInvalidChars: Use only letters, numbers and hyphens.
website.errReserved: That web address is reserved — pick another.
website.errSubdomainTaken: That web address is taken — pick another.
website.errAlreadyExists: This business already has a website.
website.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
website.brandSub: Your logo, site name and tagline — shown across every page of your site.
website.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG, up to 4 MB. A transparent PNG looks best in the header.
website.logoTypeError: Use a PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG image.
website.logoUploadError: Couldn't upload that image. Please try again.
website.taglinePlaceholder: e.g. Boutique stays in the Winelands
website.taglineHint: A short line shown under your name. Optional.
website.themeSub: Pick a look, then fine-tune the accent colour, fonts and corners. Changes show in the preview below.
website.previewBody: This is how headings, text and buttons will look on your site.
